title: filetia brookeae
intro: Filetia brookeae, also known as Brooke's Filetia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to the Philippines, particularly in the island of Luzon, and is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Filetia brookeae include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as cough and cold. Filetia brookeae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
